items.q: A value is 147. It has a 20% increase. What is the new value?
items.explanation: Apply the percentage change to the starting value.

items.q: What is the area of a triangle with base 20 cm and height 7 cm?
items.explanation: Area of triangle is (base x height) / 2.
Multiply the base by itself p times.

items.q: A value is 129. It has a 20% decrease. What is the new value?
items.explanation: Apply the percentage change to the starting value.
Divide both sides by the coefficient.

items.q: A bag has 58 red marbles and 5 blue marbles. What is the probability of drawing a red marble?
items.explanation: Probability is favorable outcomes over total outcomes.

items.q: If y = 6x + 9, then when x = 8, y = 60.
If y = 8x + 13, then when x = 3, y = 33.
A value is 45. It has a 20% decrease. What is the new value?
items.explanation: Apply the percentage change to the starting value.
